name: Star Wars
description: Iconic lines from a galaxy far, far away, spanning the Skywalker saga from the original trilogy to the prequels and sequels.
author: Quips Editorial

quotes.content: May the Force be with you.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: The franchise's signature blessing, recurring across every film; Han offers it to Luke before the Death Star trench run.

quotes.content: These aren't the droids you're looking for.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's Jedi mind trick on a Mos Eisley stormtrooper checkpoint.

quotes.content: The Force will be with you, always.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's reassurance to Luke, echoed as a disembodied voice after his death.

quotes.content: I find your lack of faith disturbing.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Vader rebukes Admiral Motti aboard the Death Star, Force-choking him for doubting the Force.

quotes.content: Help me, Obi-Wan Kenobi. You're my only hope.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Leia's holographic plea hidden inside R2-D2 that sets the story in motion.

quotes.content: In my experience, there's no such thing as luck.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's gentle correction of Han's skepticism about the Force aboard the Millennium Falcon.

quotes.content: That's no moon. It's a space station.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan recognizes the Death Star as the Falcon is drawn toward it.

quotes.content: Great, kid! Don't get cocky.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Han's warning to Luke after a TIE fighter kill during the escape from the Death Star.

quotes.content: Aren't you a little short for a stormtrooper?
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Leia's deadpan greeting to a disguised Luke in her detention cell.

quotes.content: Stay on target.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: A Rebel pilot's steady mantra during the Death Star trench run.

quotes.content: Do. Or do not. There is no try.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda's lesson to Luke about commitment while training on Dagobah.

quotes.content: No. I am your father.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: The saga's great revelation on Cloud City; popularly misquoted as 'Luke, I am your father.'

quotes.content: I know.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Han's improvised reply to Leia's 'I love you' as he is lowered into carbon freeze.

quotes.content: Never tell me the odds.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Han's retort to C-3PO while piloting the Falcon into an asteroid field.

quotes.content: Size matters not.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda chides Luke for judging the Force by physical scale before raising the X-wing.

quotes.content: Luminous beings are we, not this crude matter.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda describes the nature of the Force to Luke on Dagobah.

quotes.content: Wars not make one great.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda's rebuke to Luke when first sizing him up as a potential Jedi.

quotes.content: Why, you stuck-up, half-witted, scruffy-looking nerf herder!
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Leia's insult to Han aboard the Falcon, prompting his 'Who's scruffy-looking?'

quotes.content: Laugh it up, fuzzball.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Han's jab at a chuckling Chewbacca aboard the Millennium Falcon.

quotes.content: It's a trap!
quotes.source: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)
quotes.notes: Ackbar's realization as the Rebel fleet springs the Emperor's ambush at Endor.

quotes.content: I am a Jedi, like my father before me.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)
quotes.notes: Luke's defiant declaration to the Emperor as he refuses the dark side.

quotes.content: Many of the truths we cling to depend greatly on our own point of view.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's spirit explains to Luke why he said Vader killed his father.

quotes.content: Fear is the path to the dark side. Fear leads to anger. Anger leads to hate. Hate leads to suffering.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace (1999)
quotes.notes: Yoda warns the Jedi Council about the danger he senses in young Anakin.

quotes.content: There's always a bigger fish.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace (1999)
quotes.notes: Qui-Gon's calm observation after a sea creature devours their pursuer in Naboo's core.

quotes.content: Your focus determines your reality.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace (1999)
quotes.notes: Qui-Gon's advice to Anakin before the Boonta Eve podrace.

quotes.content: The ability to speak does not make you intelligent.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace (1999)
quotes.notes: Qui-Gon's dry put-down of Jar Jar Binks in the Naboo swamp.

quotes.content: Now, this is podracing!
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace (1999)
quotes.notes: Young Anakin's exhilaration piloting through the Boonta Eve Classic.

quotes.content: I don't like sand. It's coarse and rough and irritating and it gets everywhere.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones (2002)
quotes.notes: Anakin's much-memed attempt at romance with Padmé on Naboo.

quotes.content: Truly wonderful, the mind of a child is.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones (2002)
quotes.notes: Yoda's remark after younglings help solve the mystery of a hidden planet.

quotes.content: Only a Sith deals in absolutes.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's reply to Anakin's ultimatum during their duel on Mustafar.

quotes.content: So this is how liberty dies. With thunderous applause.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Padmé watches the Senate cheer as Palpatine declares the Galactic Empire.

quotes.content: It's over, Anakin. I have the high ground!
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's warning to Anakin atop the lava banks of Mustafar.

quotes.content: Did you ever hear the tragedy of Darth Plagueis the Wise?
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Palpatine begins seducing Anakin to the dark side at the Galaxies Opera House.

quotes.content: Hello there.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's greeting to General Grievous; he first uses the line to Luke's R2 in A New Hope.

quotes.content: Chewie, we're home.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Force Awakens (2015)
quotes.notes: Han and Chewbacca step back aboard the recovered Millennium Falcon.

quotes.content: It's an energy field created by all living things. It surrounds us and penetrates us. It binds the galaxy together.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan defines the Force for Luke during their first lightsaber lesson.

quotes.content: I have a bad feeling about this.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: The saga's running gag line, uttered by a different character in nearly every film.

quotes.content: Use the Force, Luke.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's disembodied guidance as Luke makes the trench run on the Death Star.

quotes.content: If you strike me down, I shall become more powerful than you can possibly imagine.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's warning to Vader moments before letting himself be struck down.

quotes.content: The Force is strong with this one.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Vader senses Luke's potential while pursuing him in the Death Star trench.

quotes.content: Traveling through hyperspace ain't like dusting crops, boy.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Han's retort to Luke's impatience aboard the Millennium Falcon.

quotes.content: She may not look like much, but she's got it where it counts, kid.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Han defends the Millennium Falcon against Luke's first unimpressed reaction.

quotes.content: Hokey religions and ancient weapons are no match for a good blaster at your side, kid.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Han dismisses the Force to Luke before he comes to believe in it.

quotes.content: Into the garbage chute, flyboy.
quotes.source: Star Wars: A New Hope (1977)
quotes.notes: Leia takes charge of the escape during the Death Star rescue.

quotes.content: You must unlearn what you have learned.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda pushes Luke past his doubts during training on Dagobah.

quotes.content: Always in motion is the future.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda warns Luke that visions of what is to come are never fixed.

quotes.content: Adventure. Excitement. A Jedi craves not these things.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda chides the restless Luke for the wrong reasons to seek Jedi training.

quotes.content: Judge me by my size, do you?
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda's challenge to Luke just before lifting the sunken X-wing from the swamp.

quotes.content: If once you start down the dark path, forever will it dominate your destiny.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Yoda warns Luke against giving in to fear and anger on Dagobah.

quotes.content: I am altering the deal. Pray I don't alter it any further.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Vader tightens the screws on Lando's bargain at Cloud City.

quotes.content: This deal is getting worse all the time.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Lando's resigned reaction as Vader keeps changing the terms on Cloud City.

quotes.content: Who's scruffy-looking?
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (1980)
quotes.notes: Han's indignant comeback to Leia's 'scruffy-looking nerf herder' jab.

quotes.content: Your overconfidence is your weakness.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)
quotes.notes: Luke's defiance of the Emperor, who replies that faith in friends is Luke's.

quotes.content: Tell your sister, you were right.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)
quotes.notes: The redeemed Anakin's dying words to Luke after turning on the Emperor.

quotes.content: Always two there are, no more, no less. A master and an apprentice.
quotes.source: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace (1999)
quotes.notes: Yoda explains the Rule of Two governing the Sith to the Jedi Council.

quotes.content: Begun, the Clone War has.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones (2002)
quotes.notes: Yoda's grim closing pronouncement as clone troopers march to war.

quotes.content: This is where the fun begins.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Anakin's relish as he and Obi-Wan dive into the battle over Coruscant.

quotes.content: You were the Chosen One! It was said that you would destroy the Sith, not join them!
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Obi-Wan's anguished cry at the wounded Anakin on the banks of Mustafar.

quotes.content: Power! Unlimited power!
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Palpatine exults as he blasts Mace Windu with Force lightning.

quotes.content: It's treason, then.
quotes.source: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (2005)
quotes.notes: Palpatine's quiet line as Mace Windu and three Jedi arrive to arrest him.
